speaker: Narrator
text: All Christina needed to clear her mind was to fill her stomach with some food. She walked into the kitchen and made her first realization:

speaker: Christina
text: Shit, the dishes.

speaker: Narrator
text: She hadn't done the dishes in a few days. But she could salvage something in a moment. Then another revelation.

speaker: Christina
text: I left something in the microwave... for how long?

speaker: Christina
text: Oh God... for how long?

speaker: Christina
text: At least a week!

speaker: Narrator
text: Then she made the last realization.

speaker: Christina
text: Do I even have any fucking food?

speaker: Narrator
text: She opens up the refrigerator. Some of the items here have been there since Uncle Magnus left several years ago and are therefore inedible. Leaving the rest. Week-old coffee with a ring of scum on top. Bagel and lox sandwich, sniffed and found to be spoiled. Half-eaten kebab that has now become so desiccated as to resemble a lump of coal resting on a bed of rice topped with delectable frosting of mold. She had gotten some fresh fruits from a sale at the university, but she couldn't remember how long ago that was.

speaker: Narrator
text: She opens the lower drawer and sees the bag she left the produce in, still disorganized. Some of the items have managed to survive in a way, though they have managed to live by floating about the swamp of mush.

speaker: Pasaya
text: Ok, I'm wrapping up for dinner, but hive, I want your takes...

speaker: Pasaya
text: Where's the best place to get a burger in your State, country, planet...

speaker: Pasaya
text: You're in the hivemind, you know what I mean.

speaker: Pasaya
text: Tell me!

speaker: Christina
text: There's this really overpriced place that's a quick drive away from my uh... planet?

speaker: Christina
text: I don't like hamburgers, and there's the ...

speaker: Pasaya
text: Please, I'm starving... your Queen is wasting away!

speaker: Christina
text: I'm not dressed, my phone isn't charged, my deodorant isn't working, and I really gotta scratch my damn puppa...

speaker: Pasaya
text: I'll die... Do you want your queen, your Pasaya to die?

speaker: Christina
text: No!

speaker: Pasaya
text: All you guys in the hive delivering great choices tonight!

speaker: Pasaya
text: I've got Matt's around me, but that cheese in the middle of the patty bullshit is the nastiest thing that ever, and I mean ever, came out of my home... planet.

speaker: Pasaya
text: It'll ruin your clothes the first time you try it.

speaker: Pasaya
text: Trust me!
